statement: The function checkout_rate has default parameters window=5 and limit=3.
The function checkout_rate returns a tuple with a boolean value as the first element.
The function checkout_rate returns a tuple with an integer value as the second element.
The function checkout_rate allows exactly-at-limit traffic if the length of recent is greater than the limit.
The function checkout_rate limits traffic when the length of recent is less than or equal to the limit.
The function checkout_rate uses list comprehension to filter timestamps based on window_start.
